nasb.text: and say to Tyre, who dwells at the entrance to the sea, merchant of the peoples to many coastlands, ‘Thus says the Lord God, “O Tyre, you have said, ‘I am perfect in beauty.’

esv.text: and say to Tyre, who dwells at the entrances to the sea, merchant of the peoples to many coastlands, thus says the Lord God: “O Tyre, you have said, ‘I am perfect in beauty.’

cnv.text: 要對那位於海口，跟沿海邦國通商的推羅說：‘主耶和華這樣說： 推羅啊！你曾經說過： 我是全然美麗的。

ccb.text: 告诉位于海口、跟沿海各民族通商的泰尔，主耶和华这样说， “‘泰尔啊， 你曾夸耀自己完美无瑕。
